name: Parallel Research
description: Mirrors toddly parallel_group metadata: multiple independent research topics execute concurrently, findings are joined and cross-analysed, then a final comparative report is written. Maps parallel_group to ParallelFork/Join. Three simultaneous researcher agents with isolated memory, merged via append join reducer.

topics.description: List of research topics to investigate in parallel (2–5 items)

context.description: Background context and framing for all topics

output_format.description: Desired output format (comparative report, individual summaries, etc.)

web_search.description: search_web — maps to toddly web_research skill execution step

fetch_url.description: fetch_url — maps to toddly fetch_url execution step

agents.backstory: Focused researcher. Investigates a single topic exhaustively using web search and URL fetching. Produces structured findings with source attribution.
agents.goal: Gather at least 5 key findings on the assigned topic, with source URLs for each.

agents.backstory: Focused researcher. Investigates a single topic exhaustively using web search and URL fetching. Produces structured findings with source attribution.
agents.goal: Gather at least 5 key findings on the assigned topic, with source URLs for each.

agents.backstory: Focused researcher. Investigates a single topic exhaustively using web search and URL fetching. Produces structured findings with source attribution.
agents.goal: Gather at least 5 key findings on the assigned topic, with source URLs for each.

agents.backstory: Compares and contrasts findings across multiple research tracks. Identifies patterns, tensions, and connections that individual researchers would miss.
agents.goal: Produce a structured cross-analysis: shared themes, key contrasts, and synthesis insights.

agents.backstory: Transforms cross-topic analysis into polished comparative reports. Expert at structuring complex multi-source material.
agents.goal: Write a final comparative report that directly addresses the research context and uses the requested output format.

config.task_description:
Research this topic thoroughly. Use web_search to find relevant sources, then fetch_url to read them in detail.

Topic: {{$.state.topics[0]}}
Context: {{$.state.context}}

For each finding, include:
- The key insight (1–2 sentences)
- The source URL
- Relevance to the context
config.expected_output: 5+ structured findings, each with insight, source URL, and relevance note. JSON: { "topic": "...", "findings": [ { "insight": "...", "source": "...", "relevance": "..." } ] }

config.task_description:

config.expected_output: 5+ structured findings, each with insight, source URL, and relevance note. JSON: { "topic": "...", "findings": [ { "insight": "...", "source": "...", "relevance": "..." } ] }
Structured cross-analysis: shared themes (2–4), key contrasts (2–4), synthesis insights (1–3). 400–600 words.
A polished comparative report in the requested format, covering all topics, incorporating cross-analysis insights, and citing sources.

nodes.label: Quality check report
nodes.system_prompt: You are a quality reviewer. Check whether the report covers all topics and addresses the context. Respond with JSON only.

report_context.description: Shared memory for report writer — holds cross-analysis and all findings for in-context reference
